raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find .php under /testbed, chmod 755, count. Use find -type f -name '*.php' -exec chmod 755 {} +; then count with find -printf. Combine: find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 chmod 755; then count: find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' | wc -l. But need single command. Use find with -exec chmod and -print to count. find /testbed -type f -name '*.php' -exec chmod 755 {} + -print | wc -l. That prints count.

task.query: Change permissions for all PHP files under the /testbed directory tree to 755 and print the number of files changed
